thinking:
**Updating the Workflow**

I've successfully updated the back button. My focus has now shifted to the selective process tabs (Kanban) and the "add new stage" button. I'm currently examining lines 3420 to 3533 in the source file. I believe this section will require adjustments to reflect the new functionality.


**Analyzing the UI Interactions**

I'm now diving deep into the Kanban component's rendering, specifically focusing on the stage tabs and their associated actions (moving, deleting). Lines 3423-3490 are under intense scrutiny; I'm mapping the drag-and-drop mechanics to the active tab states and action button logic. I am also investigating the impact of the "count" prop on tab and button rendering.


**Refining the New Stage**

I'm now zeroing in on the "Add New Stage" button functionality, specifically examining the related input field and the `handleAddNewStage` function. Lines 3501-3532 hold the key, and I'm analyzing the event listeners and input validation to ensure a seamless user experience. I want to make sure the implementation is robust, clean, and efficient.


**Refining the UI Elements**

I've just been updating the visual design and behavior of the Kanban component's stage tabs. I've tweaked the appearance of the active and inactive tabs, adjusting their colors, shadows, and roundedness. I've also refactored the internal display of the stage name and count within the tab button, removing unnecessary elements. I've preserved the "showActions" block's design, keeping a clean visual layout.

args.Description: "Estilizar as abas do processo seletivo (Kanban) como pílulas roxas ativas e sem borda inativas, com formato de texto simples ETAPA (QTD). Arredondar também a caixa de adicionar etapa."
args.Instruction: "Altere as classes do mapeamento das abas para exibir a aba ativa como pílula roxa com sombra e a aba inativa sem fundo ou bordas. Ajuste a renderização do contador de candidatos para ficar colado no título entre parênteses. Arredonde o contêiner de Adicionar Nova Etapa."
args.toolAction: "Atualizar abas e adicionar etapa no dashboard"
args.toolSummary: "Modifica a estilização das abas Kanban e o campo de criar etapas"
